notes: IoT-device security-certification programme established by Arm and partners. Publishes the PSA Certified Threat Model and Security Analysis (TMSA), PSA Functional API, and PSA Certified Level 1/2/3 evaluation profiles. Mixed access — some specs free, certification work paid.

data.official_name: PSA Certified Threat Model and Security Analysis
data.notes: Free download with PSA Certified copyright. Reference TMSA for IoT-device security analysis.
